languages.text: "Используем старую-добрую взрывчатку. Она не подводила человечество".
"We shall use good old-fashioned explosives. They have never failed Humanity."
languages.original_text: "Используем старую-добрую взрывчатку. Она не подводила человечество".

traits.locale_text: "We shall use good old-fashioned explosives. They have never failed Humanity."
"We shall use good old-fashioned explosives. They have never failed Humanity."
"We shall use good old-fashioned explosives. They have never failed Humanity."

languages.text: 「我々は、古き良き爆弾を使う。人類に失敗したことはない」
languages.original_text: "We shall use good old-fashioned explosives. They have never failed Humanity."

traits.locale_text: 「我々は、古き良き爆弾を使う。人類に失敗したことはない。」

languages.text: «Usemos explosivos, a la vieja usanza. Nunca le fallan a la Humanidad».
languages.original_text: "We shall use good old-fashioned explosives. They have never failed Humanity."

traits.locale_text: «Usemos explosivos, a la vieja usanza. Nunca le fallan a la Humanidad».

languages.text: “我们用最老派、最可靠的办法——炸药。炸药从未令人类失望。”
languages.original_text: "We shall use good old-fashioned explosives. They have never failed Humanity."

traits.locale_text: “我们用最老派、最可靠的办法——炸药。炸药从未令人类失望。”

languages.text: "Wir werden guten alten Sprengstoff verwenden. Er hat die Menschheit noch nie im Stich gelassen."
languages.original_text: "We shall use good old-fashioned explosives. They have never failed Humanity."

traits.locale_text: "Wir werden guten alten Sprengstoff verwenden. Er hat die Menschheit noch nie im Stich gelassen."

languages.text: "Eski usul patlayıcıları kullanacağız. İnsanlığı yarı yolda bırakmışlıkları yoktur."
languages.original_text: "We shall use good old-fashioned explosives. They have never failed Humanity."

traits.locale_text: "Eski usul patlayıcıları kullanacağız. İnsanlığı yarı yolda bırakmışlıkları yoktur."

languages.text: « Nous utiliserons des explosifs, à l'ancienne. Cette méthode n'a jamais fait défaut à l'humanité. »
languages.original_text: "We shall use good old-fashioned explosives. They have never failed Humanity."

traits.locale_text: « Nous utiliserons des explosifs, à l'ancienne. Cette méthode n'a jamais fait défaut à l'humanité. »
